entity.summary: South Africa-based cryptocurrency exchange registered on March 20, 2018 and approved in Category I and II by the Financial Sector Conduct Authority in April 2024.
entity.notes: The official history distinguishes the March 20, 2018 company-registration date from later customer onboarding and the June 2019 launch of ZAR trading pairs.

expected.summary: South Africa-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the VALR brand.

changes.summary: South Africa-based cryptocurrency exchange registered on March 20, 2018 and approved in Category I and II by the Financial Sector Conduct Authority in April 2024.
changes.notes: The official history distinguishes the March 20, 2018 company-registration date from later customer onboarding and the June 2019 launch of ZAR trading pairs.

events.title: VALR was registered as a company in South Africa
events.description: VALR was registered as a South African company on March 20, 2018.
events.notes: The official history distinguishes this registration date from later operating milestones.

events.title: VALR received Category I and II FSCA approval
events.description: The South African Financial Sector Conduct Authority approved VALR in Category I and Category II as a crypto asset service provider.
events.notes: The approval is recorded in the exchange announcement and the regulator list.

evidence.title: VALR Turns 5
evidence.notes: Official history records company registration on March 20, 2018.

evidence.title: About VALR
evidence.notes: The official company page identifies the exchange as founded in 2018 and headquartered in Johannesburg.

evidence.title: Regulatory approval as crypto asset service provider
evidence.notes: The exchange announced its Category I and II approval.

evidence.title: Authorised crypto asset service providers April 2024
evidence.notes: The regulator list includes VALR with Category I and II approval.

evidence.title: VALR official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current identity and active platform.
